description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding cabinet with a dark wood or wood-like frame and three large, light-colored front panels that likely serve as doors. The cabinet stands on four short, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The front panels are bordered by the dark frame, creating a strong visual contrast and a modern, minimalist aesthetic. The sides and back of the cabinet are solid and unadorned, matching the dark finish of the frame. The overall construction suggests it is designed for storage, with ample internal space accessible via the front doors. No handles are visible, indicating a push-to-open mechanism or concealed pulls.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet with a dark frame and three light-colored front doors, standing on four short legs. The design is minimalist, with no visible handles and a strong color contrast.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large, light-colored doors set in a dark frame, with short legs visible below.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, dark panel with no visible features except the cabinet's depth and one leg.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, dark surface with no openings or features, and the legs at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid, dark side panel and one leg.
